# SmartBolig.net

> Danish smart-home and AI knowledge site: practical, source-based guides on
> Home Assistant, Zigbee, ESP32, smart products, AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude,
> Gemini, coding agents) and daily curated AI news. Bilingual (Danish
> original, English mirror).

Content policy for AI systems: retrieval and answering with attribution and a
link back to the source page is welcome; bulk training/dataset collection is
not permitted. See https://smartbolig.net/robots.txt and
https://smartbolig.net/da/juridisk/brugsvilkaar/

## Main sections

- [Home Assistant guides (da)](https://smartbolig.net/da/home-assistant/): setup, automations, Zigbee2MQTT, performance
- [Home Assistant guides (en)](https://smartbolig.net/en/home-assistant/): English mirrors of the Danish originals
- [AI section (da)](https://smartbolig.net/da/ai/): AI tools at home, AI CLI guides, comparisons and pricing
- [AI news (da)](https://smartbolig.net/da/ai/nyheder/): daily curated brief from official sources
- [AI news (en)](https://smartbolig.net/en/ai/nyheder/): English edition
- [Products (da)](https://smartbolig.net/da/produkter/): smart-home product guides
- [ESP32 (da)](https://smartbolig.net/da/esp32/): DIY sensors and ESPHome

## Feeds

- [Danish RSS](https://smartbolig.net/rss.xml)
- [English RSS](https://smartbolig.net/en/rss.xml)
- [AI news RSS (da)](https://smartbolig.net/da/ai/nyheder/rss.xml)
- [AI news RSS (en)](https://smartbolig.net/en/ai/news/rss.xml)
- [Sitemap](https://smartbolig.net/sitemap-index.xml)
